original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Ethan, Benjamin, Luke, and Alexander. Ethan noted, "Alexander is a knight". "If Luke is a knight then Alexander is a knave," Benjamin claimed. Luke commented, "Ethan is a knave". Alexander noted, "Benjamin is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
